sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
            P.ticket_id ,
            'INIT' AS status,
            'ABNORMAL_TRAFFIC' AS alarm_type,
            '7' AS alarmlevel,
            TO_TIMESTAMP((P.INTTIMESTAMP * 1000) / 1000) as receivetime,
            TO_TIMESTAMP((P.INTTIMESTAMP * 1000) / 1000) as faulttime,
            R.STRRESNAME AS sysname,
            PM.if_id AS interface_id,
            I.STRIFNAME AS interface_name,
            P.FLTBPSIN AS bpsin,
            P.FLTBPSOUT AS bpsout,
            P.FLTPPSIN AS ppsin,
            P.FLTPPSOUT AS ppsout,
            CASE WHEN R.STRRESNAME LIKE '%-7712%' THEN '7712/5812'
                 WHEN R.STRRESNAME LIKE '%-5812%' THEN '7712/5812'
                 WHEN STRRESNAME LIKE '%-n9k%' THEN 'ngk'
                 ELSE '' END AS equiptype,
            P.fltbpsin_anomaly,
            P.fltbpsout_anomaly
        FROM rca.tb_anomalous_traffic P
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON P.STRRESID = R.STRRESID
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON P.STRRESID = I.STRRESID  AND P.STRIFID = I.STRIFID
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID
                 LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID=UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID
        WHERE P.ticket_id = '161738'
